generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline is already aligned (ALIGNED) at -237, and a T1 atomic headline misframing operation delivering threat/doubt cues fits well with the profile’s high neuroticism (anxiety 77th, anger 75th, stress vulnerability 80th) and low positive emotions (1st pct), which makes threat-salient messages land easily. However, the person is also very introverted (assertiveness 11th, gregariousness 10th) and self-conscious (100th pct), so one-shot impersonal exposure (T1, hours) is unlikely to produce more than a small reinforcing nudge toward -250 to -260; -251 reflects a modest, plausible 14-point downward shift within the admissible [-1000, -237] interval.
